infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OptiScan needs camera access to scan barcodes and QR codes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: OptiScan needs access to save generated barcodes to your Photos library.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: OptiScan needs access to save generated barcodes to your Photos library.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow OptiScan to access your camera to scan barcodes.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow OptiScan to save generated barcodes to your Photos library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow OptiScan to save generated barcodes to your Photos library.
